originalAlarm.description: `__curr_1644` could be null (null value originating from line 2678) and is dereferenced.

sanitizedDescription: `curr` could be null (null value originating from line 2678) and is dereferenced.
reasoning: curr is allocated by malloc() at L65, which can return NULL. curr is then dereferenced at L67 (curr->next = head) without a NULL check — genuine null dereference. No // ERROR at L67 (the // ERROR at L33 is for a different bug). New bug. L65-70 are in main() outside all #ifdef blocks, so the bug fires in all configs, not just CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES=T. PC = CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES is over-constrained.
